name: Customers Overview
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " are users that have registered for an account on your Neto Webstore and are approved to login and buy from your site."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto will approve all new retail customers automatically. If you would like newly registered customers to become Prospects and require account approval, click "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1561-prospects-overview", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": " for more information."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Customer Registration Process"}], "data-id": "customer-registration-process"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Customers register for an account on your Neto webstore."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The registration is successful."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Customer", "bold": true}, {"text": " will appear in your Neto Control Panel as "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Two emails will be generated from this action."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You will receive an email to let you know:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "A new user registered on "}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This email will be sent to the "}, {"text": "System Email", "bold": true}, {"text": " set in your Neto control panel."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This email is generated by the "}, {"text": "Customer Registration Notification Email (To Company)", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Your customer will receive an email notifying them of their registration:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "Thank you for registering with "}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This email is generated by the "}, {"text": "Customer Registration Welcome Email (To Customer)", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Both of these emails can be changed via the email templates page. In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Email Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Customer Registration Emails", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview of the Customer Card"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1566-customers-overview#overview", "children": [{"text": "1. User Details"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1566-customers-overview#user-details", "children": [{"text": "2. Addresses"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1566-customers-overview#addresses", "children": [{"text": "3. Payment Details"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1566-customers-overview#payment-details", "children": [{"text": "4. Account"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1566-customers-overview#account", "children": [{"text": "5. Files"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1566-customers-overview#files", "children": [{"text": "6. Other"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1566-customers-overview#other", "children": [{"text": "7. Store Locations"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1566-customers-overview#store-locations", "children": [{"text": "8. Contact Log"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1566-customers-overview#contact-log", "children": [{"text": "9. Quick Action Menu"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "User Details"}], "data-id": "user-details"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This is where you enter the general information about a customer or prospect."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you are setting up a customer account, you can create your own password or click the random generation button and tick the "}, {"text": "Email Password to User", "bold": true}, {"text": " option to notify the customer that their password has changed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select a "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/693-customer-groups", "children": [{"text": "User Group"}]}, {"text": " for the customer which determines the product visibility and pricing the user can see. By default this is set to Price Group A."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Addresses"}], "data-id": "addresses"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The primary billing and shipping addresses associated with this customer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can add multiple shipping addresses here however keep in mind that when a customer checks out whilst logged in, it will automatically use the last shipping address they used."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Payment Details"}], "data-id": "payment-details"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Information related to the customer's payment method."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Default Document Template", "bold": true}, {"text": " allows you to use different invoice templates, especially useful when running multiple businesses or serving different clients."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Default Invoice Terms", "bold": true}, {"text": " gives customers time to pay their accounts."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Preferred Payment Method", "bold": true}, {"text": " is just the default payment method the customer uses. They can still pay using different methods when logged in as a customer on the website."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Account"}], "data-id": "account"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Credit Limit", "bold": true}, {"text": " is useful when the customer has the option to pay on account. You must have a payment method setup for "}, {"text": "account payment", "bold": true}, {"text": " so it can be selected at checkout."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Manually Add Credit to Account", "bold": true}, {"text": " is another way to give a customer credit on their account. To remove the credit, just simply press the "}, {"text": "pay refund", "bold": true}, {"text": " button below the available credit (will only appear if a credit is present)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "It's not recommended using this method to give customers credit for RMA's. Instead, read "}, {"text": "our article on RMA's"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On Credit Hold", "bold": true}, {"text": " is a way to prevent customers ordering on your site if they have an outstanding balance."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Files"}], "data-id": "files"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add the ability to upload related files on the customer's card. Store images and documents."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This feature requires the "}, {"text": "Customer Files", "bold": true}, {"text": " addon from the Addon store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Other"}], "data-id": "other"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add advanced customer fields to the customer card including permissions, classifications, identification & parent customer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This feature requires the "}, {"text": "Advanced Customer Fields", "bold": true}, {"text": " addon from the Addon store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Store Locations"}], "data-id": "store-locations"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A searchable list of your stores/resellers where customers can be assigned to the closest outlet to their location. Outlets are marked on an interactive map."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This feature requires the "}, {"text": "Store Finder", "bold": true}, {"text": " addon from the Addon store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Contact Log"}], "data-id": "contact-log"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This section is used to record interactions with the customer, including times/dates."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Quick Action Menu"}], "data-id": "quick-action-menu"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to add new orders and payments."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "History", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to lookup previous orders, RMA's and wish lists."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Merge", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to merge two accounts together."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Login as Customer", "bold": true}, {"text": " on the website so you can view and test the website as a customer."}]}]}]}]
